checks.name: Initial visible controls have accessible names
Full player guide has four clear steps
Kid guide explains ordinary Self-KO
checks.detail:
PLAYER GUIDE

How to use X Deck Lab
×
1
Add your parts

Open Parts. Add boxed products or loose parts you really own.

2
Build a deck

Open Decks. Choose three Beys, or let the app suggest legal decks from your parts.

3
Run the next test

Open Test. Tap the first card. Build the shown opponent, battle once, and save the result.

4
Check readiness

Open Analysis. Green checks are passed. Open checks explain what to do next.

Self-KO means: your own Bey jumps or runs out mostly by itself. Just an
